title: Potential Effects of the Trans-Pacific Partnership on Forest Industries

summary.about: A methodological critique of estimates for TPP effects on forestry industries.
summary.audience: Forestry economists, trade modelers and policy researchers.
summary.method: Compares assumptions in the Global Forest Products Model with GTAP-based TPP studies.
summary.insights: Modeling tariffs and macroeconomic change separately may double-count effects; non-tariff rules and consistent dynamic baselines should be included.
